creator: freebsd-bugzilla@textmail.me
text:
Hello,
I'm not using FreeBSD anymore. Can you please remove me from net/sacc?
I've also sent a PR, but I'm not sure anyone looks at these.

https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/pull/198

It's a simple port - and it also could use an update.

Thanks and best regards,
Stefan
